playlist_title: New York Conference • April 13-14, 2017: "US-China Cooperation on the Belt and Road Initiative"

videos.title: U.S.-China Cooperation, 2017: Helga LaRouche Keynote
videos.description: Schiller Institute founder Helga Zepp-LaRouche's keynote address to the April 13-14th conference, "U.S.-China Cooperation on the Belt & Road Initiative," exploring the corresponding ideas in Chinese and Western thought.

videos.title: Ms. Meifang Zhang, Deputy Consul General, the Consulate General of the People's Republic of China
videos.description: Ms. Meifang Zhang, Deputy Consul General, the Consulate General of the People's Republic of China in New York, address to the Schiller Institute's conference, "U.S.-China Cooperation on the Belt & Road Initiative," exploring the corresponding ideas in Chinese and Western thought., April 13-14, 2017.

videos.title: Mr. Petr Iliichev, Chargé d'affaires, Permanent Mission of Russian Federation to the UN
videos.description: Mr. Iliichev addresses the April 13, 2017 Schiller Institute Conference, "U.S.-China Cooperation on the Belt and Road Initiative and Corresponding Ideas in Chinese and Western Philosophy," at Merkin Hall, New York, New York.

videos.title: Prof. Nie Lei, Dean, School of Traffic and Transportation, Beijing Jiaotong University
videos.description: Prof. Nie Lei, Dean, School of Traffic and Transportation, Beijing Jiaotong University addresses the Schiller Institute's "U.S.-China Cooperation on the Belt & Road Initiative," exploring the corresponding ideas in Chinese and Western thought, April 13-14, 2017.
